mapper.select: SELECT * FROM journals WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY journal_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT * FROM journals WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND journal_date = #{date} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM journals WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO journals (user_id, title, content, mood, mood_emoji, weather, journal_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{mood}, #{moodEmoji}, #{weather}, #{journalDate})

INSERT INTO journals (user_id, title, content, mood, mood_emoji, weather, journal_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{mood}, #{moodEmoji}, #{weather}, #{journalDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), content = VALUES(content), mood = VALUES(mood), mood_emoji = VALUES(mood_emoji), weather = VALUES(weather), is_deleted = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update:
UPDATE journals
title = #{journal.title}, content = #{journal.content}, mood = #{journal.mood}, mood_emoji = #{journal.moodEmoji}, weather = #{journal.weather}, journal_date = #{journal.journalDate},
WHERE id = #{journal.id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE journals SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
